_publications._publicationTitle: Biochemical and structural analyses reveal that the tumor suppressor neurofibromin (NF1) forms a high-affinity dimer.

_contextSnippet: V5-tagged neurofibromin was readily detected in the FLAG IP sample, providing evidence of an interaction between full-length neurofibromin proteins in cells
details: Successfully detected V5-tagged neurofibromin in FLAG immunoprecipitation samples, demonstrating protein-protein interactions
